name: IT-E15-mobile-classification: enforce error classification in 6 mobile screens
description: F-110: error classification is bypassed in 6 mobile screens — they parse HTTP status codes per-screen, violating the UX Resilience rule (classify at the API client boundary; screens never parse status codes). Route all 6 through the shared classification boundary (classifyApiError) and the shared ErrorFallback/TimeoutLoader patterns. The server envelope contract is FINAL as of 2026-06-11 (WI-581 envelope-router Closed) — read its diff before designing; do not invent new error types outside the landed contract. Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label errors-api).
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 screens classify via the shared boundary; no per-screen status-code parsing remains in them; fallback actions follow the primary-retry/secondary-back rule; regression test per screen or a shared boundary test covering the 6 call sites.
riskImpact: S-M / mobile-only, parallel-safe with the API-side units.
